ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the event */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the event */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the event was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the event was last updated */,
  "parent_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent event (for sub-events) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_parent_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the event type (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the event type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the event type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the role (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the permission (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the event */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_recurring" (
  "recurring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recurring event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "recurring_type" TEXT /* Type of recurring event (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "recurring_interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the recurring event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the recurring event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the recurring event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recurring event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recurring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_recurring_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_recurring_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "dependent_event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dependent event */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., mandatory, optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_dependencies_dependent_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_dependencies_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who uploaded the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_documents_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the reminder */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_reminders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "invitee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the invitee */,
  "invitation_status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "invited_by" INTEGER /* User who sent the invitation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the invitation was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitations_invitee_id FOREIGN KEY ("invitee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitations_invited_by FOREIGN KEY ("invited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee */,
  "attendee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "attendee_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendee (e.g., confirmed, tentative, declined) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who added the attendee */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_tasks_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assignee */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who assigned the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES event_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_task_assignments_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_task_assignments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_task_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_task_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_task_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES event_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_task_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_task_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment associated with the rating */,
  "rated_by" INTEGER /* User who rated the event */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_ratings_rated_by FOREIGN KEY ("rated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_ratings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "survey_question" TEXT /* Question asked in the survey */,
  "survey_answer" TEXT /* Answer to the survey question */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., feedback, evaluation) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_surveys_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Status of the event (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled)
